title: Spicy Moroccan Chickpea Flatbread
description: A flavorful and crispy flatbread topped with spicy Moroccan chickpea mixture. Perfect for a quick snack or meal.
instructions: Cut the flatbread into small pieces and place on a baking sheet.
In a bowl, mix together chickpeas, crispy, olive oil, cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, and salt.
Drizzle the lemon juice over the chickpea mixture and stir to combine.
Spread the chickpea mixture over the flatbread pieces.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, or until the flatbread is crispy and the chickpea mixture is heated through.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
